age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation: Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH and women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech with First Class or equivalent and/or MTech. with specialization in Transportation Engineering, Qualified GATE examination in Civil Engineering
qualification.details: B. Tech with First Class or equivalent and/or MTech. with specialization in Transportation Engineering. Qualified GATE examination in Civil Engineering.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000.00 per month (Consolidated) + HRA @20% per month for the first two years Rs.42,000 per month (Consolidated) + HRA @20 % for the third year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MNNIT Allahabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MNNIT Allahabad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at MNNIT Allahabad is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Tech degree with First Class or equivalent, and/or an M.Tech. with specialization in Transportation Engineering. Additionally, they must have qualified the GATE examination in Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000.00 to Rs. 42,000.00.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the MNNIT Allahabad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position at MNNIT Allahabad is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MNNIT Allahabad located?
faq.answer: MNNIT Allahabad is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211004.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state are eligible to apply, provided they meet the specified educational qualifications, age limit, and other eligibility criteria mentioned in the official notification.
